name: ghast-plugins
description: Community plugin directory for Ghast — Anthropic-format plugins (commands, skills, agents, hooks, MCP servers) discoverable from Ghast → Settings → Plugins.

plugins.name: current-datetime
plugins.description: Slash command and skill that tells the model the wall-clock time in any IANA timezone — kills the 'I don't know what day it is' problem.

plugins.name: mermaid-mindmap
plugins.description: Slash command that turns a topic or outline into a Mermaid mindmap code block the chat can render as a tree.

plugins.name: website-fetcher
plugins.description: Skill that teaches the model to fetch a URL and read its text content via the built-in WebFetch tool — 'just look at this page' without opening a browser.

plugins.name: uptime-check
plugins.description: Skill for probing whether a URL is reachable and how fast it responds, using the built-in WebFetch tool.

plugins.name: realtime-weather
plugins.description: Skill that pulls current weather and a 24h forecast for any place name via Open-Meteo — no API key, no signup.

plugins.name: github-stats
plugins.description: Skill for looking up public GitHub repo or user stats — stars, forks, issues, last commit — via the unauthenticated GitHub REST API.

plugins.name: hacker-news
plugins.description: Skill for reading Hacker News from chat — top / new / best stories plus thread fetches via the public Firebase API.

plugins.name: defillama
plugins.description: Skill for looking up DeFi protocol TVL, chain stats, and ranking via the free DeFi Llama API.

plugins.name: stock-quote
plugins.description: Skill for fetching delayed stock quotes (price, change, volume) via Yahoo Finance's public chart endpoint. No API key required.

plugins.name: steam-search
plugins.description: Skill for searching the Steam store and looking up game details (price, release date, genres, reviews) — uses Steam's public store endpoints.

plugins.name: bilibili-search
plugins.description: Skill for searching Bilibili videos and the daily ranking via the public web search endpoint — no login required.

plugins.name: seo-meta
plugins.description: Skill for pulling SEO tags from any URL — title, meta description, OG tags, canonical, H1s, robots — so the model can audit how a page presents itself.
